titel: Committee Report – Activities of the Committees during 2025.
html: In the document, the government provides an overview of the activities of the committees that have been established following decisions by the government.
tldr: The government is providing information on how the various working groups, referred to as committees, have operated during the year 2025.
lattlast:
The government has produced a document outlining the activities of various committees during the year. A committee is a group of people who have been tasked with investigating a specific issue or planning something important.

In this document, the government reviews the work of these committees. This serves as a way for the government to demonstrate the progress made within the groups it has designated to work on specific tasks.

The document is called a "memorandum." It is a formal letter or message that provides information on how the work has progressed during 2025.
